metadata.name: test2
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Ashvale.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Ashvale
towns.description: A crossroads town where adventurers gather to share rumours and ale.

key_dungeons.name: Forsaken Grotto
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Forsaken Grotto. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Forsaken Grotto for the Diamond Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
